hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams connect KYC and KYB provider outputs into audit-ready case workflows that handle identity exceptions with clear review and evidence tracking.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

problem_title: Identity reviews stall across disconnected systems
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to create and manage identity verification cases when KYC and KYB provider outputs remain in separate tools. This fragmentation slows case creation, complicates risk-based reviews and weakens audit readiness for digital asset onboarding.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates identity verification results, company checks, sanctions data and reviewer actions into one case management workflow so compliance teams can efficiently manage risk-based reviews and maintain complete audit trails.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to identity cases
workflow_description: SFTY organizes KYC and KYB provider results into structured risk reviews and case workflows for consistent identity exception management and audit-ready decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects identity verification and KYB provider results into structured cases, decisions and audit trails to support efficient, auditable onboarding and risk review workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs handling identity exceptions with controlled provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and bank due diligence in enterprise-grade deployment environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support identity review and case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how identity exceptions create onboarding review cases

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for onboarding compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance operating layer that structures onboarding workflows by connecting KYC, KYB, sanctions and document checks into consistent, auditable identity review and exception management.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage identity review cases?
faq_2_answer: SFTY turns identity verification alerts and exceptions into structured cases with decision logs, evidence packages and review history to support clear, defensible onboarding outcomes.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready onboarding evidence, including provider outputs, decision records, case notes and regulatory rule triggers, enabling full traceability for compliance and bank due diligence.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect multiple KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from multiple KYC and KYB providers, orchestrating workflows based on jurisdiction, risk and client type within one integrated compliance system.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace existing KYC or KYB providers but works above them to connect their outputs into operational compliance workflows and audit-ready cases.
final_title: Structure identity review with audit-ready cases
final_description: See how SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into controlled workflows for managing identity exceptions and compliance reviews.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
